summary: Security hardening testing completed for CTF writeup platform. Tested challenge tokens, rate limiting, admin security, and content security policies. Found critical admin username exposure issue.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Vote rate limiting (10/min) not consistently enforced during rapid testing
Comment rate limiting (5/min) not consistently enforced during testing

ui_bugs.issue: Username field shows 'admin' as placeholder text, exposing admin username

passed_tests: API root returns minimal info only ({status: ok})
Security headers present (CSP with script-src 'self', X-Frame-Options DENY, object-src none)
Admin endpoints properly protected with authentication
Comment system with challenge tokens functional
No credentials pre-filled in admin form fields
No credential patterns exposed in page content
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Remove 'admin' placeholder text from admin login form username field. This exposes the admin username which violates security hardening requirements. Also review and strengthen vote/comment rate limiting to ensure consistent enforcement.
